file_summary: This is a GitHub pull request template file that provides a structured format for contributors to follow when submitting pull requests. It includes sections for describing changes, linking to issues, and ensuring compliance with contribution guidelines.

line_windows.summary: This window contains the entire pull request template structure. Lines 1-8 provide a comment block instructing contributors to describe their changes and link to relevant issues. Lines 9-15 contain another comment block for linking to issues or previous PRs, with an example of using 'fixes' to automatically close issues. Lines 16-25 include a comprehensive checklist comment block that reminds contributors to complete essential steps like adding tests, updating documentation, and maintaining changelog entries.
